title: Ray's Better Chests (broken)
description: Ever wanted better looking chests, and don't have the time or energy to get create your own textures, well this is your solution
body:
- **Tweaked the textures from vanilla chests** to match some inspiration found online.
- **Gave the placed chests a 3D model inside**
- **Chest-boats & Minecarts have also been included** 

<details>
<summary>What's to come?</summary>

Horse, Mule, Donkey chests textures will be updated in the future. :P

</details>

![Not Required but would look better](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee6c49bc4065649faa248daa5fa91ae192751178.png)
